ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the district */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the block belongs to */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the block */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the block */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the block */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the block in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "udise_code" TEXT /* Unique UDISE code for the school */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block the school belongs to */,
  "school_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the school */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the school */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the school */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_category_id") REFERENCES school_categories ("school_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_principal_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_categories" (
  "school_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the school category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designation of the teacher */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the teacher teaches */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the teacher is assigned to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the teacher */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the teacher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the teacher */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date the teacher joined the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the teacher is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_designation_id FOREIGN KEY ("designation_id") REFERENCES designations ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the state belongs to */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., Art & Craft Materials, Books) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the resource */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being allocated */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school receiving the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource allocation */,
  "allocated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who allocated the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_allocated_by FOREIGN KEY ("allocated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher assignment */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher being assigned */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the teacher is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the teacher assignment */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assigned the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_assignments_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_assignments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "qualification_name" TEXT /* Name of the qualification */,
  "degree_institution" TEXT /* Institution where the degree was obtained */,
  "year_of_completion" TEXT /* Year the degree was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_qualifications_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_experiences" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work experience */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "previous_school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous school */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experience */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experience */,
  "position_held" TEXT /* Position held during the experience */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the experience is current */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_experiences_previous_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_experiences_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_module" TEXT /* Module accessed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
